emails.subject: Re: Jeff Richter Index Deals-error
emails.body: Re: Jeff Richter Index Deals-error Sharen had already alerted me to the first deal, which I changed, but not the second. That deal has been changed as well now. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 02/28/2001 09:06 AM

emails.subject: Jeff Richter Index Deals-error
emails.body: Jeff Richter Index Deals-error Hi Kate, I spoke with Jeff Richter this morning and the index sleeve he did on yesterday with EES (deal 533084) and Sempra(deal 533085) is incorrect in Enpower. He said he would change the publication code to reflect Dow Jones SP-15 Peak instead of Dow Jones NP-15 Peak on both of these deals. Can you please check with Jeff to see what the status is on these changes. The EES deal has been changed. The Sempra deal has not been changed. Thanks!!
